reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteBundle for the single large backdrop and keep it on a dedicated background render layer.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/world_academy_hall_background_1920x1080.png through AssetServer during duel scene setup and keep the handle in ReflectAcademyArtManifest.
runtime_notes: Anchor the texture to the world origin with a fixed orthographic camera.
Letterbox support keeps the full 1920x1080 painting visible on 16:9 displays.
Backdrop stays behind every actor and UI node with deterministic z ordering.

context.usage: Primary duel backdrop with rosewood columns, navy banners, chandelier glow, and open negative space for spell travel.

shape.silhouette: Wide academy hall interior with repeated arches, hanging lights, and a clear central lane.

specs.lighting: Warm chandelier pools in the upper half and cool cyan rune spill near the floor edge.

acceptance_criteria: Central spell lane from x=520 to x=1400 stays visually clear of large props.
Rosewood, navy, gold, and cyan accents remain readable without reducing contrast behind projectiles.
